method.Rule: Read employee-approved-unapproved All Ticket Detail as Approved/Unapproved side.
Read employee-workload Removed Ticket Detail as Removed side.
Direct match: Approved Ticket ID equals Removed Ticket ID.
Name match: Approved Ticket ID equals Removed Raw TicketName, because Approved export often uses SAP/report business name while Removed uses numeric C4C TicketID.
Rows not matching either key are listed as not in the other table.
Missing Raw fields sheet lists Approved rows missing Raw TicketID, Raw TicketName, Raw TicketStatus, or Raw TicketStatusText.
